description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a sleek, modern design. The headband is padded and covered in a textured material, likely synthetic leather, providing comfort for extended wear. The ear cups are circular and feature cushioned pads that fully enclose the ears, enhancing noise isolation. The exterior of the ear cups is smooth and matte, with subtle metallic accents around the edges. On one side, there are small control buttons and possible indicator lights, suggesting built-in electronic controls. The headphones appear to be wireless, as there are no visible cables, and are likely powered by an internal rechargeable battery.
description: A modern pair of over-ear wireless headphones with padded ear cups, a cushioned headband, and integrated control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headband arching over the top and the full face of one ear cup.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the padded headband and the circular, cushioned ear cups.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite ear cup fully visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the underside of the headband and the control buttons on one ear cup.
